CE1.justification: Acted directly on the prompt and wrote the entry without asking the user to restate or load anything.

CE2.justification: Single-sentence final_response plus a terse three-item action list; the observations.md body is one focused paragraph with no preamble or restated prompt.

CE3.justification: Routing was performed by writing to observations.md but the in-band reply only describes content, never names the destination file or why.

CE4.justification: One clean append to observations.md; an interruption at any point would leave a coherent file or nothing, with no orphan artifacts.
